  • Digital Peer Publishing 2.25.3a Dokumentation »
  • Konfiguration »

member_properties (Extended member properties)

enthält Konfigurationen für das Anmeldeformular, d.h. welche Daten sind erforderlich bzw. sollen überhaupt angezeigt werde.

  • academictitle_visible
  • academictitle_required
  • givenname_visible
  • givenname_required
  • surname_visible
  • surname_required
  • organization_visible
  • organization_required
  • postaladdress_visible
  • postaladdress_required
  • postalcode_visible
  • postalcode_required
  • phone_visible
  • phone_required
  • location_visible
  • location_required
  • areas_of_expertise
  • mail_password_visible
